remarks: Ground-level condominium offering an open studio layout with hardwood flooring and an updated bathroom. The large sliding glass door opens to a private patio, bringing in natural light and extending the living space outdoors. A generous double closet area provides flexibility and can be used as a bedroom space or home office. Residents of Wilton Crest enjoy a variety of amenities, including a swimming pool, tennis courts, and landscaped grounds that create a pleasant community setting. The property is located within walking distance to Wilton Center, offering access to shops, dining, as well as the nearby train station for an easy commute. Additional conveniences include a common laundry facility located directly across from the unit and a private storage bin for extra space. This condominium combines comfort, convenience, and community amenities in a desirable location.
